items.name: AppShell
items.doc: AppShell — DevRev desktop window composite.

items.name: BreadcrumbBar
items.doc: BreadcrumbBar — DevRev breadcrumb row composite.

items.name: CanvasPanel
items.doc: CanvasPanel — right-hand side panel for Computer / Agent Studio that surfaces artefacts of the current conversation: files created by the agent, local sources on the user's machine, connected external sources.

items.name: CapabilitySection
items.doc: CapabilitySection — a titled capability group on the agent builder page.

items.name: CardGrid
items.doc: CardGrid — responsive multi-column grid of EntityCards.

items.name: ChatEmptyState
items.doc: ChatEmptyState — centered "computer" wordmark for an empty conversation.

items.name: ChatInput
items.doc: ChatInput — Computer / Agent Studio chat input composite.

items.name: ChatMessages
items.doc: ChatMessages — conversation transcript composite for Computer / Agent Studio.

items.name: ComputerHeader
items.doc: ComputerHeader — top bar for a Computer / Agent Studio chat screen.

items.name: ComputerScene
items.doc: ComputerScene — populated, interactive Computer / Agent Studio chat screen.

items.name: ComputerSidebar
items.doc: ComputerSidebar — chat-app sidebar composite for "Computer" / Agent Studio.

items.name: DetailModal
items.doc: DetailModal — entity detail dialog with a hero banner and a primary action.

items.name: EntityCard
items.doc: EntityCard — a single selectable/listed entity row-card.

items.name: FormField
items.doc: FormField — labelled form control wrapper with required marker.

items.name: FormModal
items.doc: FormModal — DevRev "create / configure" dialog composite.

items.name: FrameLink
items.doc: FrameLink — wraps an element and makes clicking (or keyboard-activating) it navigate to another frame in the same multi-frame prototype.

items.name: Markdown
items.doc: Markdown — renders a markdown string as formatted rich text, for chat message bodies and any other place a prototype shows real (markdown) content rather than hand-written copy.

items.name: NavSidebar
items.doc: NavSidebar — DevRev navigation sidebar composite.

items.name: PageBody
items.doc: PageBody — DevRev centered page body composite.

items.name: PickerModal
items.doc: PickerModal — tabbed picker dialog with a search field and a card grid body.

items.name: SettingsCard
items.doc: SettingsCard — DevRev settings group composite.

items.name: SettingsRow
items.doc: SettingsRow — DevRev settings row composite.

items.name: SkillCard
items.doc: SkillCard — vertical capability/skill card for picker grids.

items.name: TitleBar
items.doc: TitleBar — DevRev desktop window title bar composite.

items.name: VistaFilterPill
items.doc: VistaFilterPill — segmented filter chip for the VistaToolbar filters slot.

items.name: VistaGroupRail
items.doc: VistaGroupRail — DevRev vista group/sort rail.

items.name: VistaHeader
items.doc: VistaHeader — DevRev vista page header band.

items.name: VistaPagination
items.doc: VistaPagination — footer band for vista list views.

items.name: VistaRow
items.doc: VistaRow — DevRev vista table row + canonical column vocabulary.

items.name: VistaToolbar
items.doc: VistaToolbar — DevRev vista toolbar band.

items.name: BuilderPage
items.doc: BuilderPage — agent / entity builder page template.

items.name: ComputerPage
items.doc: ComputerPage — Computer / Agent Studio chat-screen page template.

items.name: SettingsPage
items.doc: SettingsPage — DevRev settings-style page template.

items.name: VistaPage
items.doc: VistaPage — DevRev vista list-view page template.

items.name: Button
items.doc: Primary action button with variants and sizes.

items.name: IconButton
items.doc: Compact button showing just an icon.

items.name: ButtonGroup
items.doc: A row of related buttons joined together.

items.name: SplitButton
items.doc: A button with an attached dropdown of more actions.

items.name: Toggle
items.doc: A button that flips between on and off.

items.name: ToggleGroup
items.doc: A set of toggles where one or more can be active.

items.name: Link
items.doc: Styled inline navigation link.

items.name: Input
items.doc: Single-line text field.

items.name: TextArea
items.doc: Multi-line text field for longer input.

items.name: Select
items.doc: Dropdown to pick one option from a list.

items.name: Dropdown
items.doc: Menu of choices triggered by a control.

items.name: Checkbox
items.doc: A box that toggles a single option on or off.

items.name: Radio
items.doc: Selects exactly one option from a group.

items.name: Switch
items.doc: An on/off toggle styled as a sliding switch.

items.name: DatePicker
items.doc: Calendar control for choosing a date.

items.name: KeyboardShortcut
items.doc: Displays a keyboard shortcut as styled keys.

items.name: Avatar
items.doc: Round image or initials representing a person.

items.name: Badge
items.doc: Small status or count label.

items.name: Tag
items.doc: Compact label for categorizing or filtering.

items.name: Table
items.doc: Rows and columns of structured data.

items.name: Accordion
items.doc: Stacked sections that expand and collapse.

items.name: Loader
items.doc: Inline spinner for loading states.

items.name: FullscreenLoader
items.doc: Full-screen loading overlay.

items.name: Widget
items.doc: Card-like container for a dashboard tile.

items.name: Dashboard
items.doc: Grid layout that arranges widgets into a dashboard.

items.name: ChatBubble
items.doc: Message bubble for chat conversations.

items.name: Modal
items.doc: Centered dialog that overlays the page.

items.name: Popover
items.doc: Floating panel anchored to a trigger.

items.name: Tooltip
items.doc: Small hint shown on hover or focus.

items.name: Menu
items.doc: List of actions in a floating menu.

items.name: Toast
items.doc: Brief notification that pops in and fades out.

items.name: Banner
items.doc: Full-width message bar for important notices.

items.name: Tabs
items.doc: Row of tabs for switching between views.

items.name: Breadcrumb
items.doc: Trail showing the current page's location.

items.name: Sidebar
items.doc: Vertical navigation rail for an app shell.

items.name: Stack
items.doc: Arranges children in a row or column with spacing.

items.name: Grid
items.doc: Lays children out on a responsive grid.

items.name: Separator
items.doc: A thin divider line between content.

items.name: ScrollArea
items.doc: Scrollable region with styled scrollbars.

items.name: ResizablePanel
items.doc: Panel the user can drag to resize.

items.name: Chart
items.doc: Data chart — line, bar, area, pie, and more.
